violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the bar area was blocked by strainer in the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. The strainer was removed from sink basin during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

Raw animal foods (such as beef and raw seafood) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cooked lobster meat and shrimp) in prep unit #1. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Food items were rearranged during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

Raw tuna steaks were observed thawing in prep unit #1 with intact reduced oxygen packaging (ROP). Seafood items packaged in ROP shall be completely removed from their original ROP packaging prior to thawing. Food items were observed at temperatures ranging from 25-35 degrees Fahrenheit and were removed from their original packaging during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

Knives were observed stored between the backsplash of the 3-bay sink and the wall in the kitchen between uses. Utensils between uses shall be stored in one of the following manners: in water that is maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or more. in water with sufficient flow to flush particulates to the drain, or on a dry clean surface. Utensils were cleaned and sanitized during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on prep units #2 and #3 as well as the 2-door reach-in in the kitchen. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

The door to the women's toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors that open to food preparation spaces shall be self-closing to prevent potential contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2025
